query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('features', 'userStories', 'testPlans', 'defects', 'featureRequirements', 'userStoryTestCases', 'testPlanTestCases', 'defectTestCases', 'taskStatusHistory') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 34DzJoQKEqyc4cp.root --database MtjPfUT7z9e3zhUb3tuetB --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('features', 'userStories', 'testPlans', 'defects', 'featureRequirements', 'userStoryTestCases', 'testPlanTestCases', 'defectTestCases', 'taskStatusHistory') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
